Notes from building a private, local-first archive for the paper mail of a household.

07 Jul 2026 · announcements Introducing Briefkist — your mail stays home A private, local-first archive for the paper mail of a household — open source, with hosted servers opening soon.
briefkist

Your mail stays home. A private, searchable archive for the letters in your life — on hardware you control.

no third party in the data path
